title: Catastrophic Apocalypse
description: "*Will even be possible to survive in this forsaken world?*"
body:
![The Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/35f534beabb77fcda69167a3d8307943ff5683f4.png)
## "*Is it even possible to survive in this forsaken world?*"

Do your best to survive and thrive in a world filled with new varients of zombies, alongside an increase in the zombie population!
